{{Infobox character
| name = Jyrine Tessella Marten
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
| name = Jyrine Tessella Marten
| aliases = Jyrine Tessella, Jyrine Marten, Jyrine
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| abilities = manipulate green flame
| affiliations = Sleepless, Soulbound
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Jyrine Tessella Marten Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine Tessella [[Marten]] is the wife of [[Calder]] [[Marten]], a Captain in the [[Navigator]]'s [[Guild]] and captain of the ship *[[The Testament]]*. The daughter of [[Larrin Tessella]], a Watchman who died in service, Jyrine is a member of the [[Sleepless]] and a devoted believer in her cult. She possesses significant combat abilities, including the power to manipulate green flames as a [[Soulbound]], and is noted for her skills in persuasion and acting. Throughout her journey, she has demonstrated a deep ambition to facilitate negotiations with the [[Great Elders]], believing that humanity can achieve a better future through them. Her motivations are tied to her father's legacy and a desire for her sacrifices to hold meaning. Jyrine has been involved in various high-stakes conflicts, including a confrontation with [[Shera]] and the death of [[Lucan]]. While she has been perceived as a sincere believer working for the good of mankind, her actions have also been viewed with suspicion. Her life took a dramatic turn when she was believed to have died, only for her physical form to be reclaimed by [[Kelarac]], who inhabited her body.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The wife of [[Calder]] and daughter of a fallen Watchman, Jyrine Tessella [[Marten]]—known to her family as [[Jerri]]—bears script tattooed on the back of her hand. While her ultimate [[fate]] remains a mystery, she was once caught by [[Alsa Grayweather]] while waiting for [[Calder]] in a hallway and subsequently held as a prisoner in a cell. Although she is not a Reader, she possesses the ability to sense detectors and was later recounted by [[Calder]] in the [[Grayweather library]]. Despite reports from [[Shera]] that she had been killed, Jyrine was eventually seen with [[Calder]] planning a clandestine operation. During her time in a cell near [[Lucan]], she was observed holding a blighted circle of darkness.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] is [[Calder]]'s wife.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] has script tattooed on the back of her hand.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is someone whose [[fate]] [[Calder]] wants to find out about.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine Tessella is the daughter of a Watchman who died in the line of duty.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine leaned forward scenting weakness.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|It is unknown if Jyrine is dead or alive.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine was caught by [[Alsa Grayweather]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine was waiting for [[Calder]] in the hall outside his room.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] is a prisoner in a cell.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is a character who is not a Reader.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is a person [[Calder]] recounts his story to in the [[Grayweather library]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine's family calls her [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine has been killed.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine's mother once worked in an [[Imperial]] Prison.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is a character who can sense detectors.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] said Jyrine had been killed.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is a person Bliss hopes will survive.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The crew seeks to settle what happened to Jyrine.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is planning a clandestine operation.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]]'s name is Jyrine Tessella.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wonders if Jyrine has obtained weapons-grade alchemy.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jyrine is with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] sits in a cell near [[Lucan]] and holds a blighted circle of darkness.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine Tessella [[Marten]] is a [[Sleepless]] and a [[Soulbound]] capable of manipulating [[green flame]]. While held in a cell, she was observed cowering in terror against the back of her confinement and wearing a bracelet marked with an Elder symbol. Although she was positioned in a cage or cell near [[Lucan]], a wall separated them during her imprisonment. During this time, she was instructed by the [[Sleepless]] to call for assistance whenever the power of the Heart increased. Additionally, [[Shera]] possesses a memory of having stabbed Jyrine in the throat with a knife.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] is a [[Soulbound]] who can manipulate [[green flame]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] was placed in a prison cell next to [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a memory of plunging a knife into [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]]'s throat.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] told Jyrine to call for help when she feels the Heart's power increase.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine is a woman who was cowering in terror against the back of her cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine wears a bracelet with an Elder symbol.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine is in a cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine is in a cage near [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine is in a cell next to [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine is a [[Sleepless]] and a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jyrine is being held in a cell separated from [[Lucan]] by a wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jyrine Tessella [[Marten]], who is also known as [[Jerri]], was present in the temple room alongside her father. During this time, her father expressed great ecstasy regarding a rising jewel and shared his belief that she would achieve significant importance in the future. Later, Jyrine Tessella whispered her secrets into the fire.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jyrine is the daughter of a man present in the temple room.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jyrine is also referred to as [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jyrine's father is present in the temple room and is described as being ecstatic about a rising jewel.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jyrine's father believes she will be very important someday.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jyrine Tessella whispered her secrets into the fire.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] is the full name of [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jyrine is [[Calder]]'s former wife.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine Tessella [[Marten]] is a young woman distinguished by her emerald earrings and her association with a ship. While positioned at the back of an alley alongside two men, she stood as the shortest and youngest member of a group consisting of four men. As the sister of [[Petal]], Jyrine later takes on an active role in questioning [[Meia]] during an interrogation.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine is a young woman with emerald earrings.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine is the youngest and shortest person in a group of four men.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine was at the back of an alley with two men.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine is associated with a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine is [[Petal]]'s sister.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jyrine is the one interrogating [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|While held as a prisoner in a crimson suit, Jyrine Tessella [[Marten]] underwent interrogation by [[Meia]]. During this time, it was revealed that her father had sacrificed both his life and career due to his belief in the [[Elders]]. Although she managed to escape from her cell, Jyrine was later reported to have died or disappeared. In her final moments, she responded to [[Calder]] with a stream of green fire before her body was used as a vessel for [[Kelarac]]. Ultimately, the possessed Jyrine dissolved into a pillar of green light.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] is a prisoner being interrogated by [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine wears a crimson prisoner’s suit.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine's father sacrificed his career and life because he believed the [[Elders]] were the path to a better world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] escaped from her cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine [[Marten]] has died or disappeared.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]] was scheduled for interrogation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine responded to [[Calder]] with a thin stream of green fire.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kelarac]] hovered over the deck in [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]]’s flesh.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine [[Marten]] is the possessed individual [[Kelarac]] is using.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jyrine dissolved in a pillar of green light.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I’ll have you know that I caught Jyrine myself, and I have sent her straight back home.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"Jerri. That’s what my family calls me."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I would be interested in talking with your wife, should Jyrine survive.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Lucan?” Jyrine called, from the cell next door.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“That’s right. And we are, Petal. We are. So can you trust your sister, this once, when I tell you that what I’m doing isn’t going to hurt anyone?<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
